'''chatoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whatsername|whatsername]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whatsername|whatsername]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chatoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæteseth|chæteseth]] || [[word:chætesej|chætesej]] || [[word:chætesesh|chætesesh]] || [[word:chætese|chætese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatotosoth|chatotosoth]] || [[word:chatotosoj|chatotosoj]] || [[word:chatotososh|chatotososh]] || [[word:chatotoso|chatotoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatosoth|chatosoth]] || [[word:chatosoj|chatosoj]] || [[word:chatososh|chatososh]] || [[word:chatoso|chatoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatofsoth|chatofsoth]] || [[word:chatofsoj|chatofsoj]] || [[word:chatofsosh|chatofsosh]] || [[word:chatofsof|chatofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chatosotho|chatosotho]] || [[word:chatosojo|chatosojo]] || [[word:chatososho|chatososho]] || [[word:chatosoko|chatosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chatosoth|chatosoth]] || [[word:chatosoj|chatosoj]] || [[word:chatososh|chatososh]] || [[word:chatoso|chatoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chatosothol|chatosothol]] || [[word:chatosojol|chatosojol]] || [[word:chatososhol|chatososhol]] || [[word:chatosokol|chatosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chatosothotho|chatosothotho]] || [[word:chatosojojo|chatosojojo]] || [[word:chatososhosho|chatososhosho]] || [[word:chatosoko|chatosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chatosothon|chatosothon]] || [[word:chatosojon|chatosojon]] || [[word:chatososhon|chatososhon]] || [[word:chatosokon|chatosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chatosothoro|chatosothoro]] || [[word:chatosojoro|chatosojoro]] || [[word:chatososhoro|chatososhoro]] || [[word:chatosokoro|chatosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
